title: Simplified the Catalogue dashboard
summary: Reduced `/studio/catalogue/` to catalogue counts, compact Edit and Review route pills, and a plain Admin link stack.
body:
**Status:** implemented

**Area:** Studio / catalogue dashboard

**Summary:**
Reduced `/studio/catalogue/` to catalogue counts, compact Edit and Review route pills, and a plain Admin link stack.

**Reason:**
The Catalogue dashboard had accumulated explanatory text, guidance links, and workflow summary cards that slowed down routine navigation.

**Effect:**
The dashboard no longer shows descriptive intro, route descriptions, guidance, or workflow summary cards. It now shows series, works, work-detail, and moment counts; two fixed-width route columns for `Edit` and `Review`; and an `Admin` section with stacked activity-report links.

**Affected files/docs:**

- `studio/catalogue/index.md`
- `assets/css/main.css`
- `assets/studio/js/studio-dashboard.js`
- [Studio UI Rules And Decision Log](/docs/?scope=studio&doc=studio-ui-rules)
effect: The dashboard no longer shows descriptive intro, route descriptions, guidance, or workflow summary cards. It now shows series, works, work-detail, and moment counts; two fixed-width route columns for `Edit` and `Review`; and an `Admin` section with stacked activity-report links.
